33xl-website.name: 33XL SYSTEM WEBSITE
33xl-website.description: Core platform and digital headquarters of the 33XL SYSTEM. Acting as the orchestrating nucleus of all ecosystems, this portal consolidates Cauan33XL's professional dossier, centralizes advanced visual identities, and hosts a modular architecture of subprojects developed with cutting-edge technologies. Built with React 18, TypeScript, and Tailwind v4, the project demonstrates high performance through lazy loading techniques, dynamic routing, and serverless API integration, alongside smart multilingual support.

about.subtitle_page: Meet the architect behind the code. Developer focused on performance, security, and high visual impact interfaces.
about.objective_text: Build scalable systems that blend immersive aesthetics and high-performance software engineering.
about.p1: From creating OS simulations in the browser (Trymon OS) to developing complex serverless e-commerce architectures and pure TypeScript games, my focus has always been at the intersection of premium design and robust logic.
about.p2: I believe software should not only be functional, but offer a visceral experience. That's why I apply Rich Web aesthetics, Glassmorphism, and retro-punk concepts in my development hubs.
about.p3: "Cognoscere Et Creare" - To know in order to create. This is the mantra that guides my constant learning in Cybersecurity, Systems Architecture, and Front-end Engineering.
